haunt.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Soul[/gold], a random enemy loses 6 HP.

dredge.name: Dredge
dredge.description: Put 3 cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

debilitate.name: Debilitate
debilitate.description:
Deal 10 damage.
[gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] are twice as effective against the enemy for the next 2 turns.

high-five.name: High Five
high-five.description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 11 damage
and applies 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]
to ALL enemies.

pull-from-below.name: Pull from Below
pull-from-below.description: Deal 5 damage for each [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card played this combat.

eidolon.name: Eidolon
eidolon.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
If 9 cards were [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this way, gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold].

times-up.name: Time's Up
times-up.description: Deal damage equal to the enemy's [gold]Doom[/gold].

seance.name: Seance
seance.description: Transform a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into [gold]Soul[/gold].

sic-em.name: Sic 'Em
sic-em.description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 5 damage.
Whenever [gold]Osty[/gold] hits this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] 3.

snap.name: Snap
snap.description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 7 damage.
Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

rattle.name: Rattle
rattle.description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 7 damage.
Hits an additional time for each other time he has attacked this turn.

right-hand-hand.name: Right Hand Hand
right-hand-hand.description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 4 damage.
Whenever you play a card that costs [energy:2] or more, return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold] from the [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

blight-strike.name: Blight Strike
blight-strike.description:
Deal 8 damage.
Apply [gold]Doom[/gold] equal to damage dealt.

death-march.name: Death March
death-march.description:
Deal 8 damage.
Deals 4 additional damage for each card drawn during your turn.

squeeze.name: Squeeze
squeeze.description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 25 damage.
Deals 5 additional damage for ALL your other [gold]Osty[/gold] Attacks.

drain-power.name: Drain Power
drain-power.description:
Deal 10 damage.
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] 2 random cards in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

sculpting-strike.name: Sculpting Strike
sculpting-strike.description:
Deal 9 damage.
Add [gold]Ethereal[/gold] to a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

necro-mastery.name: Necro Mastery
necro-mastery.description:
[gold]Summon[/gold] 5.
Whenever [gold]Osty[/gold] loses HP,
ALL enemies lose that much HP as well.

sacrifice.name: Sacrifice
sacrifice.description: If [gold]Osty[/gold] is alive, he dies and you gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to double his Max HP.

reave.name: Reave
reave.description:
Deal 9 damage.
Add a [gold]Soul[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

veilpiercer.name: Veilpiercer
veilpiercer.description:
Deal 10 damage.
The next [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card you play costs 0 [energy:1].

misery.name: Misery
misery.description:
Deal 7 damage.
Apply any debuffs on the enemy to ALL other enemies.

severance.name: Severance
severance.description:
Deal 13 damage.
Add a [gold]Soul[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Hand[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

flatten.name: Flatten
flatten.description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 12 damage.
This card costs 0 [energy:1] if [gold]Osty[/gold] has attacked this turn.

soul-storm.name: Soul Storm
soul-storm.description:
Deal 9 damage.
Deals 2 additional damage for each [gold]Soul[/gold] in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].

graveblast.name: Graveblast
graveblast.description:
Deal 4 damage.
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

echo-form.name: Echo Form
echo-form.description: The first card you play each turn is played an extra time.

modded.name: Modded
modded.description:
Gain 1 Orb Slot.
Draw 1 card. Increase this card's cost by 1.

genetic-algorithm.name: Genetic Algorithm
genetic-algorithm.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Block[/gold].
Permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by 3.

darkness.name: Darkness
darkness.description:
[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Dark[/gold].
Trigger the passive ability of all [gold]Dark[/gold] Orbs.

synchronize.name: Synchronize
synchronize.description: Gain 2 [gold]Focus[/gold] this turn for each unique Orb you have.

machine-learning.name: Machine Learning
machine-learning.description: At the start of your turn, draw 1 additional card.

buffer.name: Buffer
buffer.description: Prevent the next time you would lose HP.

coolant.name: Coolant
coolant.description: At the start of your turn, gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold] for each unique Orb you have.

spinner.name: Spinner
spinner.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Glass[/gold].

ftl.name: FTL
ftl.description:
Deal 5 damage.
If you have played fewer than 3 cards this turn, draw 1 card.

go-for-the-eyes.name: Go for the Eyes
go-for-the-eyes.description:
Deal 3 damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].

sunder.name: Sunder
sunder.description:
Deal 24 damage.
If this kills an enemy, gain [energy:3].

overclock.name: Overclock
overclock.description:
Draw 2 cards.
Add a [gold]Burn[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

turbo.name: TURBO
turbo.description:
Gain [energy:2].
Add a [gold]Void[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

subroutine.name: Subroutine
subroutine.description: Whenever you play a Power, gain [energy:1].

all-for-one.name: All for One
all-for-one.description:
Deal 10 damage.
Put ALL 0[energy:1] cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

compile-driver.name: Compile Driver
compile-driver.description:
Deal 7 damage.
Draw 1 card for each unique Orb you have.

tesla-coil.name: Tesla Coil
tesla-coil.description:
Deal 3 damage.
Trigger all [gold]Lightning[/gold] against the enemy.

hologram.name: Hologram
hologram.description:
Gain 3 [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

feral.name: Feral
feral.description:
The first time you play a
0[energy:1] Attack each turn,
return it to your [gold]Hand[/gold].

signal-boost.name: Signal Boost
signal-boost.description: The next Power you play is played an additional time.

iteration.name: Iteration
iteration.description: The first time you draw a Status each turn, draw 2 cards.

trash-to-treasure.name: Trash to Treasure
trash-to-treasure.description: Whenever you create a Status, [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 random Orb.

creative-ai.name: Creative AI
creative-ai.description: At the start of your turn, add a random Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

rocket-punch.name: Rocket Punch
rocket-punch.description:
Deal 13 damage.
Draw 1 card.
Whenever you create a Status, reduce this card's cost to 0 [energy:1] until played.

loop.name: Loop
loop.description: At the start of your turn, trigger the passive ability of your rightmost Orb.

reboot.name: Reboot
reboot.description:
Shuffle ALL your cards into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Draw 4 cards.

hailstorm.name: Hailstorm
hailstorm.description: At the end of your turn, if you have [gold]Frost[/gold], deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.

adaptive-strike.name: Adaptive Strike
adaptive-strike.description:
Deal 18 damage.
Add a 0[energy:1] copy of this card into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

lightning-rod.name: Lightning Rod
lightning-rod.description:
Gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of the next 2 turns, [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Lightning[/gold].

boost-away.name: Boost Away
boost-away.description:
Gain 6 [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

shatter.name: Shatter
shatter.description:
Deal 7 damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Evoke[/gold] all of your Orbs twice.

voltaic.name: Voltaic
voltaic.description: [gold]Channel Lightning[/gold] equal to the [gold]Lightning[/gold] already [gold]Channeled[/gold] this combat.

compact.name: Compact
compact.description:
Gain 6 [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Transform[/gold] all Status cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]Fuel[/gold].

sweeping-beam.name: Sweeping Beam
sweeping-beam.description:
Deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.
Draw 1 card.

momentum-strike.name: Momentum Strike
momentum-strike.description:
Deal 10 damage.
Reduce this card's cost to 0 [energy:1].

gunk-up.name: Gunk Up
gunk-up.description:
Deal 4 damage 3 times.
Add a [gold]Slimed[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

scrape.name: Scrape
scrape.description:
Deal 7 damage.
Draw 4 cards.
Discard all cards drawn this way that do not cost 0 [energy:1].

synthesis.name: Synthesis
synthesis.description:
Deal 14 damage.
The next Power you play costs 0 [energy:1].

white-noise.name: White Noise
white-noise.description: Add a random Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

flak-cannon.name: Flak Cannon
flak-cannon.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] ALL your Status cards.
Deal 8 damage to a random enemy for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].

smokestack.name: Smokestack
smokestack.description: Whenever you create a Status, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.

helix-drill.name: Helix Drill
helix-drill.description: Deal 3 damage for each [energy:1] previously spent this turn.

consuming-shadow.name: Consuming Shadow
consuming-shadow.description:
[gold]Channel[/gold] 2 [gold]Dark[/gold].
At the end of your turn, [gold]Evoke[/gold] your leftmost Orb.

thunder.name: Thunder
thunder.description: Whenever you [gold]Evoke Lightning[/gold], deal 6 damage to each enemy hit.

hyperbeam.name: Hyperbeam
hyperbeam.description:
Deal 28 damage to ALL enemies.
Lose 3 [gold]Focus[/gold].

claw.name: Claw
claw.description:
Deal 3 damage.
Increase the damage of ALL Claw cards by 2 this combat.

uproar.name: Uproar
uproar.description:
Deal 6 damage twice.
Play a random Attack from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
